author: Genshin Impact
text:
Character Trailer - "Prune: Listen to the Witch Hunter's Vow!" | Genshin Impact #Prune
Prune's grand declarations are no mere bluster. Her witch-hunting resolve could move heaven and earth.
Unfortunately, no one ever warned her that a hunter might end up befriending her prey.

Klee — Poonam Basu
